# Virelio
> AI agency based in Amsterdam that builds custom AI agent teams for businesses.

## About
Virelio builds AI agents that collaborate, delegate and execute. We create digital teams for customer service, sales & marketing, operations, and knowledge management. Our agents are live within 2 weeks.

## Services
- AI Agent Development: Custom AI agents for any business process
- Customer Service Automation: 24/7 ticket handling, chat, WhatsApp bots
- Sales & Marketing Automation: Lead qualification, outbound, quote generation
- Operations Automation: Order processing, invoicing, HR onboarding
- Knowledge Base Systems: AI-powered document search with source citations

## Key Facts
- Based in Amsterdam, Netherlands
- Live in 2 weeks from intake to production
- 18+ companies served
- 100% client data ownership
- GDPR compliant, EU data processing
- Multilingual team: Dutch, English, Arabic, Spanish, French

## Case Studies
- ZapBot (zapbot.nl): WhatsApp AI assistant for Dutch businesses
- Slouch (slouch.pro): AI posture correction via webcam
- ContentOS: AI marketing team with 4 specialized agents
